{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Witness' Guild
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Witness' Guild]] is a group [[Calder]] is interested in joining.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Mother, didn’t we speak the other day about the possibility of my joining the Witness’ Guild?”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
